german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: Most roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility but with significant unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Lead, Core PMs Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A notable gap exists between customer-facing and core PM roles, indicating a potential imbalance in project management focus.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Market Landscape
seniority.subtitle: With 45% of positions held by senior professionals, the market reflects a strong senior presence despite mixed signals.

work_mode.title: Fragmented Work Modes Indicate Uncertain Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remain unclassified, highlighting mixed expectations for remote and on-site work.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Key Roles
ai.subtitle: Only 28% of positions prioritize AI responsibilities or require AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Equal Representation Across Sectors
industry.subtitle: No single sector dominates, but unclassified roles limit overall accessibility.
